---
title: "S2"
author: "Huiding Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r,include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cat)
library(survey)
library(kableExtra)
library(VGAM)
library(distributionsrd)
library(ggplot2)
library(truncnorm)
library(reshape2)
library(paletteer)
library(plotly)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(RVAideMemoire)
library(glmnet)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE,message = FALSE)
```

# Basic Setups


## Simulation Parameters

```{r}
### Overall setup
set.seed(1)
nsiz = 3.34e6
nss  = 5.5e3
naou = 3.5e4
alpha <- c(0.5,-0.1,0.2,-0.5,-1,-1.5,
           0,0,
           -0.2,0.4,0.6,0.8)
beta <- c(-2.8,-0.1,-1.0,-1.2,-2.4,-3.6,
          0,0,
          -0.3,0.3,0.4,0.7)
gamma <- c(-7,0.12,-0.4,0.3,0.6,0.9,
           -0.2,0.4,
           0.6,0.3,0.6,0.9)
names_var <- c("catx1","catx2","catx3")
true_model <- as.formula(paste0("~",paste0(c("catx1","catx2","catx3","catx4","catx5"),
                                           collapse = "+")))
```

## Sample Function

```{r}
source("../../Functions/sample_functions.R")
```

## Output Function

```{r}
source("../../Functions/output_functions.R")
```


## Supplementary functions

```{r}
source("../../Functions/supplementary_functions.R")
```

## Simulation Function

```{r}
source("../../Functions/simfun.R")
```


# Running Simulation

```{r}
n = 1e3

if(file.exists("../../Results/Res_methods/S2.RData")){
  load("../../Results/Res_methods/S2.RData")
}else{
  sim_result <- lapply(1:n, function(seed) {
    suppressWarnings(sim.fun(seed, nsiz, alpha, beta, gamma, names_var, true_model))
  })
  save.image("../../Results/Res_methods/S2.RData")
}
```
